content: To get a half gram to a gram of protein per pound of bodyweight, diversify among meat, fish, shellfish, insects, eggs, and dairy products.
For optimal health, aim for 1,000 milligrams to 1.5 grams of calcium daily by consuming three servings of dairy products or edible bones.
Eat a variety of carbohydrates including whole grains, legumes, starchy tubers, and fruits, and consider cutting out whole grains if needed.
Consume several cups of diverse vegetables daily, focusing on dark greens, and vary colors to ensure a wide range of nutrients.
Include digestive aids like ginger, fermented foods, and enzymes in your meals to enhance nutrient absorption.
